COMMENT=Quality cuts: mag err < 1.0 and iterated bright-side robust clip

COMMENT=Family: Phocaea. Adopted rotation period 12.942 h (2P),

COMMENT=doubling, adversarially verified against raw photometry. status=CONFIRMED.
COMMENT=Note: DOUBLED 1P->2P 6.471->12.942h (high-amp 1P audit 2026-07-18: folded amp 0.616 = elongated/double-peaked; house rule amp>0.40->2P).
